demo1/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.13 to align with the Java 21 migration and Jakarta EE namespace requirements.
demo1/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; using Spring Boot 2.x with Java 21 and Jakarta dependencies causes classpath conflicts and missing API errors.

demo1/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property to 21 to target the new JDK version.
demo1/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project continues to compile against Java 11 features, failing to utilize or enforce Java 21 compatibility.

demo1/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace the javax.xml.bind dependency with the jakarta.xml.bind equivalent to comply with Jakarta EE namespace migration in Spring Boot 3.
demo1/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3 removes support for javax.* namespaces; using javax.xml.bind results in ClassNotFoundException or NoClassDefFoundError at runtime.

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter inheritance with modern SecurityFilterChain bean configuration.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6.0 (required for Spring Boot 3.x/Java 21 migration).

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Remove @Override annotation from configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder) as it is no longer overriding a method from the removed adapter class.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.why_exists: Method no longer overrides anything after removing WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter inheritance, causing compile error if @Override remains.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.before:
@Override
    protected void configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder auth) throws Exception {
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.after:
/*~~(Migrate manually based on https://spring.io/blog/2022/02/21/spring-security-without-the-websecurityconfigureradapter)~~>*/@Override
    protected void configure(AuthenticationManagerBuilder auth) throws Exception {

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Remove @Override annotation from authenticationManagerBean() as it is no longer overriding a method from the removed adapter class.
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.why_exists: Method no longer overrides anything after removing WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter inheritance, causing compile error if @Override remains.

demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.general_idea: Migrate HttpSecurity configuration from deprecated fluent API (antMatchers, .and()) to new lambda-based API (requestMatchers, withDefaults).
demo1/src/main/java/com/example/demo/con.why_exists: antMatchers and the old fluent API methods are removed in Spring Security 6.0; code will not compile without migration to requestMatchers and lambda DSL.
